next_steps: Perform kidney biopsy for histopathologic diagnosis
Serologic evaluation including ANA, anti-dsDNA, C3, C4, and anti-PLA2R antibodies
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
24-hour urine collection for quantification of proteinuria
Initiate ACE inhibitor or ARB for proteinuria management
Begin prophylactic anticoagulation due to high-risk nephrotic syndrome
Consider therapeutic trial of levothyroxine for subclinical hypothyroidism
